.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(249, 245, 215) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(249, 245, 215) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(235, 219, 178) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(235, 219, 178) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgb(235, 219, 178) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(249, 245, 215) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, rgb(249, 245, 215) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(rgb(249, 245, 215), color-mix(in srgb, rgb(249, 245, 215) 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, rgb(249, 245, 215) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(rgb(249, 245, 215), color-mix(in srgb, rgb(249, 245, 215) 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(249, 245, 215) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(249, 245, 215) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(249, 245, 215) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(235, 219, 178) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(235, 219, 178) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(235, 219, 178) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(249, 245, 215) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(235, 219, 178) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(168, 153, 132) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(249, 245, 215) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(235, 219, 178) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(250, 189, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(235, 219, 178) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(235, 219, 178) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr.background: rgba(235, 219, 178, 0.7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgba(235, 219, 178, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgba(235, 219, 178, 0.7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgba(189, 174, 147, 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
